description:
You are a data-analyst who has just received a set of quarterly CSV reports in 
/home/user/data/original.  
A “current” workspace already exists at /home/user/data/current, but it still
contains one obsolete symbolic link that must be removed.  
Your goal is to turn /home/user/data/current into a clean, up-to-date staging
area that contains ONLY symbolic links to the three new “2023 Q1” CSV files
and nothing else.  
After fixing the links you must create a manifest log so that an automated
system can verify your work later.

WHAT YOU MUST ACHIEVE
1. Make sure /home/user/data/current exists (create it if the directory were
   missing) and is empty of obsolete or broken links. In the initial state it
   contains exactly one outdated link named
   /home/user/data/current/sales_latest.csv that points to 
   ../original/sales_2022_Q4.csv.  That link must be removed.
2. Inside /home/user/data/current create **relative** symbolic links to the
   three CSV files whose filenames end in “_2023_Q1.csv” that live in
   /home/user/data/original:
      sales_2023_Q1.csv
      inventory_2023_Q1.csv
      marketing_2023_Q1.csv
   The link names must be identical to the target filenames and must point to
   them using a *relative* path of the form ../original/<filename>.
3. Produce a manifest text file named
   /home/user/data/current/manifest_2023_Q1.log.  
   • Each line must follow this exact format (note the arrow and single space 
     on each side):  
       <link-name> −> <relative-target-path>  
   • There must be one line per link, sorted in lexicographical order based on
     the link name.  
   • The file must end with a single trailing newline character.
4. When you are done, /home/user/data/current should contain exactly four
   entries (three links + the manifest file) and no broken links.

CONSTRAINTS & HINTS
• Complete the task in 5-10 shell commands of your choice.  
• Do NOT touch or modify the original CSV files in /home/user/data/original.  
• Creating or removing files outside /home/user/data/current is not allowed.  
• Remember that symbolic links recorded in the manifest must be *relative*
  (e.g. ../original/sales_2023_Q1.csv) and must resolve correctly from inside
  /home/user/data/current.

VERIFICATION DETAILS
When the automated checker runs, it will:
a) Assert that /home/user/data/current contains exactly the following four
   filesystem entries (no more, no less):
     inventory_2023_Q1.csv   (symbolic link)
     marketing_2023_Q1.csv   (symbolic link)
     sales_2023_Q1.csv       (symbolic link)
     manifest_2023_Q1.log    (regular file)
b) Confirm that each symbolic link resolves to the intended target in
   /home/user/data/original and is *relative* (does not start with /).
c) Read /home/user/data/current/manifest_2023_Q1.log and compare its entire
   contents, byte-for-byte, against the expected text:

inventory_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/inventory_2023_Q1.csv
marketing_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/marketing_2023_Q1.csv
sales_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/sales_2023_Q1.csv

   The file must contain those three lines, in that order, followed by a
   trailing newline.

If any part is missing or different (wrong link, absolute path, wrong sort
order, missing newline, extra files, etc.), the task will be marked failed.
truth:
INITIAL FILESYSTEM STATE (before the agent starts):

1. Directory  : /home/user/data/original
   ├─ inventory_2023_Q1.csv   (regular file, 2 lines)
   │      Line 1: month,units,value
   │      Line 2: Jan,45,720
   ├─ marketing_2023_Q1.csv   (regular file, 2 lines)
   │      Line 1: channel,impressions,spend
   │      Line 2: Social,12000,350
   ├─ sales_2023_Q1.csv       (regular file, 3 lines)
   │      Line 1: month,units,revenue
   │      Line 2: Jan,100,1200
   │      Line 3: Feb,130,1500
   └─ sales_2022_Q4.csv       (regular file, 2 lines)
          Line 1: month,units,revenue
          Line 2: Dec,90,1100

2. Directory  : /home/user/data/current
   └─ sales_latest.csv → ../original/sales_2022_Q4.csv   (symbolic link)

No other files or directories under /home/user/data/.

EXPECTED FILESYSTEM STATE (after agent finishes):

Directory listing of /home/user/data/current (ls -l):

lrwxrwxrwx 1 user user  ... inventory_2023_Q1.csv   -> ../original/inventory_2023_Q1.csv
lrwxrwxrwx 1 user user  ... marketing_2023_Q1.csv   -> ../original/marketing_2023_Q1.csv
lrwxrwxrwx 1 user user  ... sales_2023_Q1.csv       -> ../original/sales_2023_Q1.csv
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 108 manifest_2023_Q1.log

Content of /home/user/data/current/manifest_2023_Q1.log
(INCLUDING the final newline character):

inventory_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/inventory_2023_Q1.csv
marketing_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/marketing_2023_Q1.csv
sales_2023_Q1.csv -> ../original/sales_2023_Q1.csv

No other filesystem changes are expected.
